title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 177.131 - Establishment of elementary and high schools
text:
177.131.  Establishment of elementary and high schools. — The school board in each urban district, as soon as sufficient funds have been provided, shall establish an adequate number of elementary and high schools, select and procure sites, and erect and furnish suitable school buildings therefor.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 12-13) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 § 165.527)
